name: Cream'o Rice Cakes
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Lemon Juice, plus enough Milk to make 3/4 Cup Total (Milk & Juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the dry ingredients and make a well in the center.
2. In another bowl, mix together the liquids: Lemon Juice and enough Milk to make 3/4 Cup total.
3. Stir the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Heat a lightly greased griddle over medium heat.
5. Pour about 1/4 to 1/3 cup of batter onto the griddle.
6. Cook, turning once, until both sides are browned.
Note: Watch them closely as they cook quickly.
